title: Dos caras tiene el destino
writer: Edmundo Báez, Agustín P. Delgado, Jean-Paul Malaquais
actors: Miroslava, Eduardo Noriega, Carlos López Moctezuma
plot: Roberto, once a great doctor, loses a patient because of his alcoholism. He flees far away, taking the identity of a man similar to him whom he has seen die.
